payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and matte finish; vertical rectangular panel shows visible wood grain and a faint diagonal scratch, right edge is partially cropped by the image with a lamp occluding the corner, and no hardware is visible — approximately 1.0 m from camera.
